entry.title: Tritiumfunction
entry.summary: Essential Characterization The final structure established by the Eurasian Union maintains a world where settlement is not allowed, jointly executed by both Eurasia. It opposes the post-confrontational world led by science, which interprets a closed doomsday mechanism. The human body in this structure is part…
entry.content:
Essential Characterization

The final structure established by the Eurasian Union maintains a world where settlement is not allowed, jointly executed by both Eurasia. It opposes the post-confrontational world led by science, which interprets a closed doomsday mechanism. The human body in this structure is part of the real-world computational entity; the initial algorithm...

Core Functions

Replacing political governance with real-world disasters, occurring in the form of miraculous deaths; simultaneously rejecting human extinction in an unexpected, non-centralized, and uncontrollable manner. Setting disasters as an unaccountable settlement mechanism: failure must be named failure; disasters occur, but their meaning cannot be explained. By pre-selecting miracles, a political-theological identity is given to the disaster. The master knows that the heavy calculations will lead to the final disaster, but before it arrives, all crises can only "oscillate," not "break."

Dual Structure
Heavy Key (Bloodline Side, Asia Responsible)
Responsible for managing people, inheritance, resources, and internal struggles, based on families, bloodlines, and factions. Each bloodline unit has a complete personnel structure and cleanup mechanism, and a dedicated carrier scheduling role is established to internally designate the "fact carrier" when a miracle conflict occurs.

In reality, the carriers will fight each other, and miracles will "naturally" occur during the slaughter. The ultimate victor will further strip away the plan, be removed from the list, and disappear.

Cold Calculation (European Side) A system that suspends inexplicable things and miraculous events. It does not recognize any form of inheritance or narrative.

Its function is limited to determining the severity of disasters or whether miracles constitute an incompatible conflict, and, when necessary, requisitioning factual carriers from the bloodline side.

Cold Calculation retains only the lowest semantic density information, such as statistics, death statistics, and anomalous readings; the highest level of aggregation is recorded only as a binary result of "allowed existence/termination of existence."

Development History | Period | Status | Before World War I | Bloodline and Miracles were strictly separated; life determined facts, and the victor was eliminated. | After World War I | Miracles and Bloodlines entered the same central function for the first time. | Before the war | The "Double Calculation" split; the "Miracle Man" appeared in Berlin. | During the war | Washington attempted to portray the "revolution" itself as a miracle, but endured Moscow's opposition; the Reich of Berlin developed the atomic bomb as the "ultimate fact carrier." | After World War II | Nuclear weapons were designated as a doomsday settlement and insurance mechanism. | During the Cold War | Arithmetic cipher and global nuclear information were forcibly bound together; the Cold Calculation re-cipher was rebuilt. | Key Event in 2036: "Miracle Hedge" | In February 2036, the Revolutionary Army besieged Linhai City. The Cold Calculation Council determined the city to be "terminated" and prepared to trigger pre-set nuclear mines. The Bloodline Council simultaneously designated three fact carriers to resist the attack, attempting to create a "miracle to save the city." | The clash of the two forces resulted in a three-day "Time Eye" appearing in Linhai City—everyone could see fragments of the past and future. The Revolutionary Army used the Time Eye to predict the defenders' deployment and attacked the city ahead of schedule. The cold calculation method was the first time that reality was shattered for me.

entry.title: Post-science
entry.summary: Essential Characterization Primordial ritual art centered on fatalistic rationality no longer belongs to the sustained field of any remaining civilization. Practical science centered on political power, ultimately expected to be operational; demanding mastery, construction, sculpting, and sacrifice, establishing the theory as a whole in a…
entry.content:
Essential Characterization

Primordial ritual art centered on fatalistic rationality no longer belongs to the sustained field of any remaining civilization.
Practical science centered on political power, ultimately expected to be operational; demanding mastery, construction, sculpting, and sacrifice, establishing the theory as a whole in a state of perpetual war.
Post-science transforms language into political practice, requiring temporary benefits through costs, failures, and sacrifices.

Internal Structure: Eurasian Dual Centers
European Core—Para-Provision: All legitimacy is only temporarily reclaimed in the present. History is violently reverted to itself, dragging time towards the present.

Asian Core—Destiny (Excessive Recursion): Historical violence that expands continuously through excessive, multi-layered, and layered self-preservation. Dragging time towards the future.

The two cannot cancel each other out, generating a high point on the Caucasus-Ural boundary: the Heart of Science.


Four Major Parts
Part One: Holistic Technique Centered on Life and Death
Power (Power)
A holistic technological formula where ordinary workers, capital, education, academia, and the economy all transcend the national complex as their primary discipline. Judging right and wrong through forgery and admitting mistakes, through folding operations, preserving secrets, and sacrificing oneself.

Ethics | Naming (Designation)
Through the classification of event reality and life-cycle wars, it indicates the Manhattan-type numerological bloodline. It possesses the functions of sculpting spells, foreseeing designs, future wheelchairs, and neural connections.

Human Vas
Also known as Human Vas or Human Insects. The smallest unit of measurement that is forcibly indivisible, centered on death. The binary elimination method of the life and death results of the theoretical subject archive and its multiple subject chains as a complex.

Part Two: Time Reality
War | Time (War | Time)
Time wars, similar to military conflicts, are the art of world production in a post-scientific system, used to gather all human resources to maintain institutional balance. It occupies space through time manipulation; it generates a constant field boundary through the simultaneous invocation of the three armies of reality, past, and future.


Reason | Silence
The heart of the container, the plant, the nerve.

Economy | Sacred (Oikonomia)
The practical side of post-scientific practice, the a priori declaration of the triple helix gene that forces time to move forward.

Part Three: The Continuous Form Existing from Instantaneous Civilization to Organs Sub-item Content Summary Temporary | The currently condemned, forbidden messiah, as the voice destiny of the "shining scepter" traversing the Earth's core | Free imagination, the inward spiral shape defines the drip irrigation of overload stability, the universality of "followed freedom," the entire entrance of any local section, the repeatable traumatic wholeness of the spherical world, the overall globalization, the return of hypertrophic earth source, the things of the dead and the living, the anti-time as the part of the bloodline of the birth, the life of the brain, the external face, the internal membrane supporting the organs, the ban. Severed Love (Eurasia)

Part Four: Rotation and Self-Sustaining
Sub-item Summary: Axis | Scientific Gyroscope Centripetal Force Tri-Spin Cosmic Structure, Southern Shambhala Core Survey | Neutral Humanity as the Archipelago Tortoise Star Angel's Large Suspension Chain Light Dust Eating Course Distribution Used for Commemoration and Initiation of Ghost Warism | The Reasons for People Gathering Together for Consumption Under the Unique Homeland Complex of Intellectuals | Hierarchical World Class Developing Itself, That is, People's Yearning for a Better Future Death Killing | Infinity For the Judgment of Ghosts, Killing Death Suicide to Obtain Immortality Past | Archives Speak History. The Life Language That Living Beings Cannot Touch

Part Five: Time Folding
Time folding is the greatest product of post-science; it is its own starting point. It is defined as a kind of origin of time itself—the triadic tension between the past, future, and present.

entry.title: Solutions Office
entry.summary: Essential Characterization A product of the New Human Project, a hypothetical miracle subsequently transformed by the scientific movement. Originating from the deductive reasoning of the Eurasian information war and mutual denial within the Human Project, not an intentionally established entity. The "Solution" office itself appears…
entry.content:
Essential Characterization

A product of the New Human Project, a hypothetical miracle subsequently transformed by the scientific movement.

Originating from the deductive reasoning of the Eurasian information war and mutual denial within the Human Project, not an intentionally established entity.

The "Solution" office itself appears as a spiritual entity that has collapsed into matter.

Not an organizational solution, but a shared, implicitly accepted miracle of "the necessity of an ultimate solution."

Core Function

Providing a central explanation for the predetermined outcome of the Human Project's "inevitable failure."

A hidden point that draws together various scattered explanations, inferences, conspiracies, and reactions.

Utilizing the absence of a clear actor, making disastrous, failed, and abnormal decisions to achieve structurally rational results.

Unforgivable The real-world cost of this supplement is translated as "an unrevealed solution is in operation."

Known Locations (2036)

**Old underground air-raid shelter in the mountain city (western fortress)**—Appeared during the height of the civil war in the autumn and winter of 2034; officers from both sides who entered later made unusual decisions to surrender or hold out to the death.
**Secret room of the Tiancheng Diya Party headquarters**—Diya Party leader Yuan Tiangang claimed to have entered; after exiting, he launched the "Imperial Army's" frenzied counter-offensive.
**According to a certain floor of the Linhai City National Brain Data Center**—It is rumored that Deng Xiaoping secretly entered and introduced forward-looking market policies.

**Changes in Entrants** All those who have entered the "office" exhibit an "inexplicable certainty" in their subsequent political behavior. They no longer hesitate, no longer weigh options, and seem to have already found a "solution." These people are called "those touched by the office."

entry.title: New Human Project
entry.summary: Core Functions **Slip-to-Death (SPD)** Invalidates death at the system level. By organizing the continuum of memory, nerves, identity, and will, it renders "death" indeterminate and ineffective in the social, cognitive, and power systems. **Uni-Logos (Uni-Logos)** Establishes a single, unbranchable primordial science, whose basic propositions are…
entry.content:
Core Functions

**Slip-to-Death (SPD)** Invalidates death at the system level. By organizing the continuum of memory, nerves, identity, and will, it renders "death" indeterminate and ineffective in the social, cognitive, and power systems.

**Uni-Logos (Uni-Logos)** Establishes a single, unbranchable primordial science, whose basic propositions are simultaneously established within the same semantic framework as physical, biological, conscious, political, and economic meanings, no longer relegated to disciplinary logic or explanatory systems.

**Will-Erasure (Will-Erasure)** Severs the contingency of human will, transforming it into experienced necessity, thereby ending all suffering related to causality, choice, and freedom, making things no longer confined to human will.

Execution Process

**Stage 1: Truth Binding and Filtering** The system defaults to three premises: truth is scarce; science is neutral; theory and its bearer can be distinguished.

**Stage 2: Theoretical Life System (Large-Scale Operation)** As information conflicts expand exponentially, instead of optimizing solutions, hundreds or thousands of non-conflicting "theoretical life systems" are simultaneously running, forcing each model to be pushed to its logical and survival limits under real-world conditions through physical means. Phase Three: The Twin Mechanism (After the Escalation of the Eurasian Conflict)
Under four premises, evidence, and data conditions, two opposing theoretical conclusions are forcibly generated, requiring both to be self-consistent and operational simultaneously.


Core Team Location (2036)
Base One: Located in the northwestern mountainous region of the Asian Union, originally a super laboratory jointly managed by Eurasia. It was occupied by the Revolutionary Army at the end of 2035, but its internal data has been investigated or hidden.

Base Two (Formerly the "Twin Laboratory"): Located underground in the Special Zone "Linhai City," it is currently secretly operated by the Special Zone government for research into the "twin" mechanism.

entry.title: The power of politics
entry.summary: 2036年政治体制总览 集团 形式 主义 路线 武力 北京路线 身体根据 新民主主义、身体包围大脑、人民战争 农村身体中心论 120万人民野战军 莫斯科路线 大飞跃公司 一国建成社会主义、集体化 越山主义 30万公社自卫军+10万契卡 亚洲联合（双头政权） 亚洲联合革命布尔什维克党 先锋队党、民主集中制、无产阶级专政 联合列宁主义 250万人民红军+2100万复制人军队 不断革命阵线（清洗对象） — 不断革命论 折叠托洛茨基主义 5–8万游击专家团队 亚洲联合民主同盟（清洗对象） — 第三条道路，宪政民主 联合三民主义 1万民主官僚集团自卫军 大亚细亚帝国复兴党（外部势力） — 法西斯主义（东京-柏林轴心） 帝国亚细亚主义 15万皇道军+柏林技术官僚系统 特区联合政府（分裂主义） — 社会民主主义（欧） 特区社会主义 5万特安队+网络部队+1万档间谍军 亚洲联合临时政府 — 皇家-官僚集团 君主立宪+官僚陷亡…
entry.content:
2036年政治体制总览

集团 形式 主义 路线 武力
北京路线 身体根据 新民主主义、身体包围大脑、人民战争 农村身体中心论 120万人民野战军
莫斯科路线 大飞跃公司 一国建成社会主义、集体化 越山主义 30万公社自卫军+10万契卡
亚洲联合（双头政权） 亚洲联合革命布尔什维克党 先锋队党、民主集中制、无产阶级专政 联合列宁主义 250万人民红军+2100万复制人军队
不断革命阵线（清洗对象） — 不断革命论 折叠托洛茨基主义 5–8万游击专家团队
亚洲联合民主同盟（清洗对象） — 第三条道路，宪政民主 联合三民主义 1万民主官僚集团自卫军
大亚细亚帝国复兴党（外部势力） — 法西斯主义（东京-柏林轴心） 帝国亚细亚主义 15万皇道军+柏林技术官僚系统
特区联合政府（分裂主义） — 社会民主主义（欧） 特区社会主义 5万特安队+网络部队+1万档间谍军
亚洲联合临时政府 — 皇家-官僚集团 君主立宪+官僚陷亡 40万白军/政府军+2100万复制人军队

 I. United Leninism → United Asian Revolutionary Bolshevik Party
Self-Name: United Bolsheviks / United Bolshevik Party / Party
Armed revolution to replace the royal bureaucracy and establish a United Asian Soviet Republic under the dictatorship of the proletariat. Emphasizing the "special Asian path," but retaining the vanguard of Leninism, democratic centralism, and the goal of world revolution.

Social Base: Industrial workers (heavy industry, military industry, ports), poor peasants and farm laborers, revolutionary intellectuals, and some junior officers.
Armed Forces: United Asian People's Red Army (abbreviated as "People's Red Army"), approximately 250 people.
Key Figures:

Party Chairman (Zinoviev-Mao Zedong style) – Nguyen Ai Quoc (originally named Nguyen Son, studied at Moscow Oriental University, led the General Labor Union in 1993)
Military Commander (Tukhachevsky-Lin Biao style) – Lin Bei

Territory: Controlled 80% of the inland rural areas, small and medium-sized cities, and industrial bases. Headquarters located at the "Smolny-Yan'an" Joint Command.

Slogans: "Peace, Land, Work!" "Folders of the World, Unite!"

II. Folding Trotskyism → Continuous Revolutionary Front
Self-proclaimed: Continuous Revolutionary Front/Asian Branch of the Fourth International/True Bolsheviks
He calls himself: Folding Trotskyist, Time Heretic (because they oppose the legitimacy of time folding)
Afghan Core: Believes time folding is a hoax created by the bureaucratic class and conservatives within the party, with the aim of instigating a national criminal revolution. Advocates continuous revolution, opposes "one country seizing socialism," and opposes any alliance with the bourgeoisie.

Armed Forces: Red Guard guerrillas, approximately 5-8 people, scattered underground in cities and along mountain borders.
Representative Figure: Theorist and guerrilla commander (Trotsky-Zhang Guotao style) – Plekhanov Chen (alias Chen Pojun)
Slogans: "Folding is contradiction!" "Continuous revolution until the world Soviet!"

III. Great Leap Forwardism → Great Leap Forward Commune Party
Self-Named: Asian United Great Leap Forward Commune Party / Leap Forward Faction / Commune Party
Other Names: Great Leap Forward Faction, Antiquated Steelmaking Party (derogatory)
Core of Pakistan: Achieving industrialization and agricultural socialization at the fastest speed, at any cost. Advocating "traditional steelmaking," "large-scale military operations," and militarized management.

Armed Forces: Commune Self-Defense Army (approximately 30 people, militia); Red Guard Headquarters (approximately 10 armed students)
Representative Figures:

General Secretary of the Party (Stalin-Mao Zedong style) – Jin Dayue (original name Jin Yuejin)
Red Guard Commander-in-Chief – Wen Gong (female, former university student)

Slogans: "More than fifteen years in the West!" "The Commune is paradise!"

IV. Rural-Centered Theory → Base Area Alliance (Rural Faction)

Core: Adhering to the line of "encircling the cities from the countryside and seizing politics by armed force." Emphasizing land reform as the core of the revolution, opposing premature urbanization and large-scale industrialization.

Armed Forces: The main force of the "field army" within the People's Red Army, approximately 120 people
Representative Figures:

Commander-in-Chief of the People's Red Army (Zhu De-Peng Dehuai style) – Zhu Shanhe
Chairman of the Base Area Alliance (Liu Shaoqi-Deng Xiaoping style) – Liu Nongcun

Territory: Northwest mountainous areas, North China Plain base areas, rural areas in the middle reaches of the Yangtze River. Headquarters located in "Red Flag Fort".

Slogans: "Land returns home, takes charge!" "Countries first, cities later!"

V. United Three Principles of the People → Asian United Democratic Alliance
Self-proclaimed: Asian United Democratic Alliance / Democratic League / Third Force
Afghan Core: National independence (opposition to external imperial groups), civil rights and freedoms (constitutional democracy), people's well-being (national collapse). Opposes class struggle and the dictatorship of the proletariat, but also opposes the corruption of the royal bureaucracy.

Social Base: National bourgeoisie, urban middle class, some liberal intellectuals, overseas Chinese

Representative Figures:

Chairman of the Democratic League (Sun Yat-sen-Lee Teng-hui style) – Sun Yat-sen (claims to be a descendant of Sun Yat-sen)
Military Commander – Cai Weimin

Slogans: "United nation-building, democratic unification!" "Not red slaves, not white slaves!"

VI. Imperial Asianism → Greater Asia Imperial Restoration Party
Afghan Core: Restoration of the traditional imperial order of Asia (a variant of the Greater East Asia Co-Prosperity Sphere), implementation of militarism and racial hierarchy. They believed the Asian Union's monarchy was too weak and needed more forward-looking expansion and restructuring. They were anti-communist, anti-Western, and anti-democratic.

Social base: Remnants of the old aristocracy, some warlord officers, right-wing students, and organized crime groups.

Representative figures:

President of the Imperial Asia Party (a Tojo Hideki-Yuan Shikai type) – Yuan Tiangang

Military commander – Itagaki Sakae

Territory: The northeastern frontier of the Asian Union (Manchuria/Northern Korea) and several corresponding island fortresses. Headquarters was located in "Fengtian City".

VII. Special Economic Zone Socialism → Special Economic Zone United Government

Afghanistan core: Using technocratic and market economic methods to bail out the Asian Union, preserving the revolutionary spirit in name only, but with a damaged mindset. Supporting "national planning" – managing the economy using computers and biotechnology.

Social Foundation: Technocrats, engineers, foreign-invested enterprise managers, comprador capitalists

Representative Figures:

Chief Executive of the Special Administrative Region (Deng Xiaoping-Gorbachev style) – Deng Xiaoping
Chief Engineer of the National Brain Project – Qian Zhineng

Slogans: "Development is the hard truth!" "The National Brain is the future!"

VIII. Royal Bureaucratic Group → Asian United Provisional Government

Afghanistan Core: Constitutional monarchy + bureaucratic collapse. The Emperor is retained as a symbolic head of state, but actual power is held by the bureaucratic comprador group. Support for "community modernization."

Armed Forces: "Asian United Defense Forces" (i.e., White Army/Government Army), approximately 40 personnel. Well-equipped (with Western refugees), but morale is low and internal corruption is severe.

Representative Figures:

Emperor (Nicholas II-Pu Ritual) – Hirohito Lee (Henry Lee, a figurehead emperor)
Provisional Government President (Chiang Kai-shek-Kerensky style) – Chiang Ching-kuo (strongman leader)
Commander-in-Chief of the National Defense Forces (Denikin style) – Bai Zhenguo

entry.title: New Asian Edition
entry.summary: Soviet Russia under the Leadership of the CCP In the Russian environment, the CCP forces were forced to abandon the strategy of "encircling the cities from the countryside," but retained organizational clusters based on "Party command," "ideological party building," and the "mass line." Key Battles:…
entry.content:
Soviet Russia under the Leadership of the CCP

In the Russian environment, the CCP forces were forced to abandon the strategy of "encircling the cities from the countryside," but retained organizational clusters based on "Party command," "ideological party building," and the "mass line."

Key Battles:

1917 October Revolution: First, Soviet areas were established in the Ural Mountains and rural Siberia, then the Winter Palace was forcibly surrendered through the strategy of encircling the cities from the countryside.

1918–1922 Civil War: Trotskyist regular armies were replaced by rural guerrilla warfare and "sparrow warfare."

1941–1945 Soviet-German War: Moscow was abandoned, and troops retreated into the vast forests and swamps, establishing territories behind enemy lines, ultimately relying on "people's war" to defeat Young Germany.



China under the Leadership of the Bolsheviks

The Bolsheviks arrived in China, but their expertise in urban uprisings met with setbacks in China's small-scale agricultural environment.

Key Battles:

1927: The Shanghai workers' general strike was swiftly suppressed by Chiang Kai-shek and the foreign concessions, due to the lack of peasant support.

1930s Anti-Encirclement Campaigns: The Eighth Route Army persisted in fighting "regular defensive warfare," but suffered total annihilation in the fifth anti-encirclement campaign, marking a disastrous defeat in the Long March.

War of Resistance Against Japan: The Bolshevik Eighth Route Army was unable to effectively mobilize the masses, ultimately relegating itself to a secondary role.

entry.title: Beijing-Moscow
entry.summary: Revolutionary History: The Principal Contradiction Two Brains in the Same Body Beijing (Body Center) Possesses the most complete historical bodily data (sleep patterns of 1.4 billion people, obesity distribution, pain thresholds) Refuses to acknowledge the necessity of a "suspended brain," insisting on the spontaneous movement…
entry.content:
Revolutionary History: The Principal Contradiction
Two Brains in the Same Body
Beijing (Body Center)



Possesses the most complete historical bodily data (sleep patterns of 1.4 billion people, obesity distribution, pain thresholds)
Refuses to acknowledge the necessity of a "suspended brain," insisting on the spontaneous movement of the historical body
Analysis: Pain is expressed by the historical body itself; any "unified measurement" of pain by a suspended brain is idealism.

Moscow (Suspended Brain Center)

Possesses preliminary post-scientific fracture experience (Siberian dark matter causing catastrophes, Urals time-folding events)
Initially began experimenting with "suspended brain" structures, but with insufficient body data, it has long been in a state of "having a brain but no torso"
Analysis: Pain must be uniformly measured by a suspended brain; otherwise, each body will claim its own pain as the most authentic.

Core of the Struggle: Pain Sovereignty

What is "Pain Sovereignty"? The power to decide whose pain is calculated, whose sacrifices are recorded, and whose body becomes the unit of historical measurement.

Four Strategic Objectives of the Moscow Route
Strategic Objective 1: Acquire a Sufficient Scale of Bodily History
Through the "debt growth agreement" during the cold calculation of the major crisis, connect parts of Beijing's physical area to Moscow's pain measurement system.

Strategic Objective Two: Dismantle the "Spontaneous Myth" of the Beijing Approach
Not through sabotage, but through "non-intervention." Create a sufficiently large-scale, cold-computing shock event to completely defeat "spontaneity," then intervene as a "rescuer."

Strategic Objective Three: Reconstruct the Timeline of Revolutionary Orthodoxy
Declare all revolutionary achievements of the Beijing approach as "prehistory of the Suspended Brain"—all struggles between 1949 and 2040 are redefined as "primitive materialist practices of the pre-organ era."

Strategic Objective Four: Seize the Root Node of Global Cold-Computing Recalculation
The crucial root node of cold-computing recalculation is the location of the "original pain definition agreement." Seizing power = rewriting "the patient's experience is an individual's feeling" as "pain is an organ's measurement."

 


Path to Seizure: Four Nodes

Node One: Conspiracy Period (Superficial Cooperation) Both sides jointly address the global cold-computing crisis. The Moscow Suspended Brain seizes the opportunity to access part of Beijing's data infrastructure—"auxiliary measurement" on the ground—effectively connecting to the neural synapses of the Suspended Brain.

Node Two: Rejection Reactions (Outbreak of Civil War) Beijing's body begins to experience a "materialistic rejection" of the Moscow brain. The civil war is not a positional war, but a war of support: Moscow cuts off debt buffers in certain regions; Beijing attempts to repair itself through a "spontaneous rebalancing of its historical body."

Node Three: Brain Transplant Surgery (Change of Regime) The oldest historical bodies within Beijing (the physical remains of revolutionary veterans) actively request access to the Moscow brain—because they have been exhausted by too many failed "spontaneous movements." This is seen as a "turning point in history itself."

Node Four: Rewriting Revolutionary History (Gaining Legitimacy) The first action after the establishment of the new regime: convening a plenary meeting of representatives to vote on "when history begins anew."

entry.title: Historical Line
entry.summary: 1991—2005 MAPPING TO 1903—1917 THE ORIGINAL STABLE FORM OF THE NEW HUMANITY. INITIATED JOINTLY BY THE ROYAL-BUREAUCRATIC GROUP AND THE WESTERN INTERVENTION FORCES, IT ATTEMPTED TO FREEZE CLASS CONTRADICTIONS THROUGH “SLIP DEATH,” “RULE,” AND “SEVERANCE OF WILL.” WITHIN THE ASIAN UNION, IT EXISTED AS AN…
entry.content:
1991—2005
 
MAPPING TO 1903—1917
 
THE ORIGINAL STABLE FORM OF THE NEW HUMANITY. INITIATED JOINTLY BY THE ROYAL-BUREAUCRATIC GROUP AND THE WESTERN INTERVENTION FORCES, IT ATTEMPTED TO FREEZE CLASS CONTRADICTIONS THROUGH “SLIP DEATH,” “RULE,” AND “SEVERANCE OF WILL.” WITHIN THE ASIAN UNION, IT EXISTED AS AN “INTERDISCIPLINARY CORE RESEARCH GROUP,” WITH ESPIONAGE WARFARE AS ITS GUIDING PRINCIPLE.
 
2005—2010
 
MAPPING TO 1917—1923
 
DURING THE CIVIL WAR, THE NEW HUMANITY PROJECT WAS FORCIBLY INTEGRATED INTO THE MILITARY-POLITICAL MACHINE UNDER THE PRESSURE OF TOTAL WAR. BLOODLINES AND MIRACLES ENTERED THE SAME CENTRAL HUMAN RACE FOR THE FIRST TIME.
 
2010—2015
 
MAPPING TO 1924—1927
 
A SPLIT EMERGED WITHIN THE NEW HUMANITY PROJECT. ONE SIDE PRODUCED “MIRACLE PEOPLE”; THE ASIAN AND EUROPEAN SIDE ATTEMPTED TO PORTRAY THE “REVOLUTION” ITSELF AS A MIRACLE BUT OPPOSED THE SPLIT.
 
2015—2025
 
MAPPING TO 1927—1937
 
THE NEW HUMANITY PROJECT TEETERED ON THE BRINK OF COLLAPSE. THE ATOMIC BOMB, AS THE “ULTIMATE CARRIER FACT,” WAS CREATED, AND COLD COMPUTATION BEGAN TO TAKE SHAPE.
 
2025—2033
 
MAPPING TO 1937—1945
 
DURING THE WAR AGAINST AGGRESSION, THE COLD COMPUTATION KEY WAS LINKED TO GLOBAL NUCLEAR DETERRENCE, BECOMING THE EUROPEAN UNION’S DOOMSDAY SAFETY NET.
 
2033—2035
 
MAPPING TO 1945—1947
 
THE NEW HUMAN PROJECT COMPLETELY FAILED. THE “SOLUTIONS OFFICE” APPEARED AS A HYPOTHETICAL MIRACLE. SUBSEQUENTLY, THE SCIENTIFIC MOVEMENT UNFOLDED IN FULL FORCE, AND TIME WAS REDISCOVERED AND INSTITUTIONALIZED.
 
SPRING 2036
 
MAPPING TO 1948
 
THE MAIN STAGE OF THE STORY. POST-SCIENCE IS THE UNDERLYING OPERATING LOGIC OF THE WORLD; THE COLD COMPUTATION SYMBOL STILL EXISTS, BUT IT IS BEING SHAKEN BY THE STRATEGIC COUNTER-OFFENSIVE OF REVOLUTIONARY FORCES.
